description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing - be it to secure your trousers, or act as a styling detail to your outfit. This twill tape belt from fastrack is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Made of twill tape with Leatherette on the tail of the belt for durability and style Metal loops buckle to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Brand logo embossed on the tail Care Use a brass polisher to maintain buckle shine Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
